stemHtml: A pilot is experiencing a fuel emergency due to incorrect flight planning and needs to divert to the nearest suitable airport. However, the shortest route to the airport requires entering a restricted area. Is the pilot permitted to enter the restricted airspace in this situation?

options.a: Yes, in an emergency a pilot may enter a restricted area and inform ATC to clear the airspace.
options.b: No, the pilot is not allowed to enter restricted airspace because the emergency was caused by pilot error.
options.c: No, the pilot must perform an offsite landing outside the restricted area, regardless of the situation.
options.d: Yes, the pilot may enter the restricted area and does NOT need to inform ATC.
